/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/zone_render_mini.dir/src/zone_render_mini.cpp.o  -o /home/nvidia/catkin_ws00/devel/lib/ouster_ros/zone_render_mini  /home/nvidia/catkin_ws00/devel/lib/libouster_client.a -lpthread /home/nvidia/catkin_ws00/devel/lib/libnmea.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libzip.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
